restaurants.name: Cafe Chill
restaurants.ambience: Trendy and relaxed café with open-air seating.
highlights: Good mid-drive lunch stop with quick service

restaurants.name: Rainbow Café
restaurants.ambience: Casual vegetarian-friendly café popular with travelers.

attractions.name: Nine Arch Bridge
attractions.description: Hidden among thick jungle and tea estates, this iconic colonial-era railway bridge is one of Sri Lanka's most photographed landmarks. You may catch the bright blue train crossing slowly over the arches.
attractions.hours: Open all day (best visited in daylight)

attractions.name: Ravana Falls
attractions.description: A dramatic multi-tiered waterfall cascading beside the main road. The surrounding rock formations and misty spray create a refreshing break during the drive.

attractions.name: Ravana Cave
attractions.description: Believed in legend to be part of Ravana's underground network during the Ramayana era, the cave requires a short climb up steps.
